title: ABV IIITM Gwalior Post-Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 10 Posts
organization: Indian Institute of Information Technology and Management Gwalior
short_info: Indian Institute of Information Technology and Management Gwalior (ABV IIITM Gwalior) Post-Doctoral Fellow (IPDF) Notification 2026 has been released on 23 April 2026 on the official website. A total of 10 vacancies have been announced through the ABV IIITM Gwalior IPDF Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD or equivalent (D.Sc.), First class (≥ 6.5 CGPA / 60%) in UG & PG, At least one degree from CFTI or QS ≤500 foreign university, Age maximum 35 years, Apply within 5 years from PhD defense
qualification.details: PhD or equivalent from a recognized institute/university. First class (≥ 6.5 CGPA / 60%) in Undergraduate (UG) and Postgraduate (PG) studies. At least one degree or work experience from a CFTI (Centrally Funded Technical Institution) or a QS ranked ≤ 500 foreign university. Application must be submitted within 5 years from the PhD defense date. At least 3 SCI/SSCI/SCIE indexed publications, with at least one publication in a Q1 journal.

selection_process: Shortlisting by Screening Committee Technical presentation Personal/Technical interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ABV IIITM Gwalior Post-Doctoral Fellow (IPDF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
